creator: gert@greenie.muc.de
text:
Hi,

a new version of nfdump has been released, which fixes a few bugs and is strongly recommended to upgrade to, see

https://github.com/phaag/nfdump/issues/503
https://github.com/phaag/nfdump/releases

I'm running 1.7.4 on my netflow collection / nfsen machines and it works nicely, fixing the logspam from nfprofile.

I can't provide a patch right now, but it's really trivial - change PORTVERSION=, remove files/patch-configure.ac (included in the 1.7.4 release), make makesum, go.

thanks :-)

gert
